name: ALLOWED_MODELS
purpose: Referenced in resolve_model priority list as a possible source for model selection.

name: B64_DECODE_OPT
purpose: Platform-detected base64 decode option exported by base64 detection helper.

name: B64_WRAP_OPT
purpose: Platform-detected base64 wrap option exported by base64 detection helper.

name: BATCH_FILE
purpose: Input file read line-by-line for batch processing of payloads.

name: BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE
purpose: File containing built messages (.messages) used to construct payloads.

name: CANONICAL_EXTRAS_DIR
purpose: Percorso canonico della directory extras sotto GROQBASH_DIR.

name: CHAT_MODE
purpose: Flag enabling interactive chat mode that requires a TTY and processes turns.

name: CONVERSATION
purpose: Accumula la cronologia testuale della chat interattiva; viene inizializzata a stringa vuota e aggiornata concatenando i turni utente.

name: CONTENT
purpose: Primary textual content input used when assembling the request payload.

name: CURL_BASE_OPTS
purpose: Conservative default curl options used for HTTP calls (e.g., --silent --show-error --no-buffer --max-time).

name: DEST_BASE
purpose: Destination base directory for installing 'extras' (canonicalized path derived from GROQBASH_EXTRAS_DIR or provided source).

name: DEST_PROV
purpose: Destination directory for provider assets when installing 'extras' (uses PROVIDERS_DIR if set, otherwise ${DEST_BASE}/providers or canonical_config_dir/providers).

name: DEBUG
purpose: Debug level flag; controls diagnostic behavior and preservation of temp artifacts.

name: DRY_RUN
purpose: When truthy, disables network calls and API key checks; used to skip actual HTTP requests.

name: ERRF
purpose: Path to the run-specific error/diagnostic file where curl stderr and diagnostics are written.

name: FINAL_MODEL
purpose: Resolved final model name determined by resolve_model before final validation.

name: GROQ_API_KEY
purpose: Provider-specific API key for Groq; can be overridden by PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq.

name: GROQBASH_API_KEY
purpose: Fallback API key used if provider-specific key is not set.

name: GROQBASH_API_URL
purpose: Environment variable considered when resolving provider URL (ENV precedence).

name: GROQBASH_CONFIG_DIR
purpose: Canonical configuration directory path used for ui_state and other config files.

name: GROQBASH_DIR
purpose: Repository root or base directory derived from the script location.

name: GROQBASH_DEBUG
purpose: Variabile alternativa per impostare DEBUG se DEBUG non è già definita.

name: GROQBASH_ERR_API
purpose: Canonical error code for API errors as defined in the canonical error codes.

name: GROQBASH_ERR_BAD_MODEL
purpose: Canonical error code indicating an invalid or unsupported model selection.

name: GROQBASH_ERR_CURL_FAILED
purpose: Canonical error code for curl/network failures.

name: GROQBASH_ERR_INVALID_JSON
purpose: Canonical error code for invalid JSON responses or payloads.

name: GROQBASH_ERR_NO_API_KEY
purpose: Canonical error code used when an API key is missing.

name: GROQBASH_ERR_NO_PROMPT
purpose: Canonical error code used when no prompt/content is provided.

name: GROQBASH_ERR_TMP
purpose: Canonical error code related to temporary file/directory errors.

name: GROQBASH_EXTRAS_DIR
purpose: Directory path for extras; part of the canonical directory layout variables.

name: GROQBASHERRAPI
purpose: Alias della costante di errore GROQBASH_ERR_API.

name: GROQBASHERRBAD_MODEL
purpose: Alias della costante di errore GROQBASH_ERR_BAD_MODEL.

name: GROQBASHERRCURL_FAILED
purpose: Alias della costante di errore GROQBASH_ERR_CURL_FAILED.

name: GROQBASHERRNOAPIKEY
purpose: Alias della costante di errore GROQBASH_ERR_NO_API_KEY.

name: GROQBASHERRNO_PROMPT
purpose: Alias della costante di errore GROQBASH_ERR_NO_PROMPT.

name: GROQBASHERRTMP
purpose: Alias della costante di errore GROQBASH_ERR_TMP.

name: GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR
purpose: Directory path where history files are stored.

name: GROQBASH_HISTORY_KEEP_DAYS
purpose: Parameter controlling history retention by age for rotation.

name: GROQBASH_HISTORY_MAX_BYTES
purpose: Parameter controlling maximum total bytes for history before rotation.

name: GROQBASH_HISTORY_MAX_FILES
purpose: Parameter controlling maximum number of history files to keep.

name: GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY
purpose: Lock timeout variable used for history lock operations.

name: GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MODELS
purpose: Lock timeout variable used for models file operations.

name: GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_TMP
purpose: Lock timeout variable used for temporary directory/file operations.

name: GROQBASH_LOG
purpose: Optional path to append structured logs; default stderr.

name: GROQBASH_MODELS_DIR
purpose: Directory path used as base for MODELS_FILE and model caching.

name: GROQBASH_PROVIDER_URL
purpose: Resolved provider URL used to build api_url for provider calls.

name: GROQBASH_ROTATE_HISTORY
purpose: Flag/parameter that controls whether history rotation is enabled.

name: GROQBASH_TEMPLATES_DIR
purpose: Directory path for templates as part of the directory layout variables.

name: GROQBASH_TMP_PAYLOAD
purpose: Run-specific staged payload path used when staging base64 payloads.

name: GROQBASH_TMPDIR
purpose: Canonical base temporary directory for run-specific tempdirs; must be inside GROQBASH_DIR.

name: HISTORY_LOCK
purpose: Lock file variable used to coordinate history operations.

name: JSON_INPUT
purpose: JSON input variable used to supply messages or content for payload assembly.

name: LEGACY_EXTRAS_DIR
purpose: Percorso legacy della directory extras sotto SCRIPTDIR.

name: LEGACY_REAL
purpose: Canonicalized path of LEGACY_EXTRAS_DIR used to detect and compare a legacy extras directory during install-extras validation.

name: LIST_MODELS
purpose: Flag di default per la modalità di listaggio dei modelli (inizializzato per evitare errori con set -u).

name: LIST_PROVIDERS
purpose: CLI flag indicating the user requested a list of available providers; used to trigger immediate listing and exit.

name: MAX_MODELS
purpose: Maximum number of models to save when refreshing model lists (default 200).

name: MAX_RETRIES
purpose: Maximum number of retries used by perform_request_once for API calls.

name: MAX_TOKENS
purpose: Maximum tokens parameter validated and converted for payload construction.

name: message_id
purpose: Identifier used by session_append for idempotency markers across processes.

name: MESSAGES_JSON
purpose: Alternate input containing messages in JSON form used to build the payload.

name: MODEL
purpose: Active model identifier prior to resolution; used as input to resolve_model.

name: MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG
purpose: Path to the provider-specific model configuration file (result of canonical_model_file for the active provider) used during model resolution.

name: MODELS_FILE
purpose: Path to the file storing the list of available models.

name: MODELS_LOCK
purpose: Lock file used to coordinate access to MODELS_FILE.

name: OUT_PATH
purpose: Percorso di output predefinito (variabile runtime inizializzata a vuoto per evitare errori).

name: OUTPUT_MODE
purpose: Controls output formatting (text|raw|json|pretty).

name: PAYLOAD
purpose: Run-specific payload file path created under RUN_TMPDIR for the request.

name: PRINT_MODEL_FILE
purpose: Flag/variabile usata per richiedere la stampa del percorso canonico del file modello; se non vuota il codice stampa canonical_model_file(PRINT_MODEL_FILE) e termina.

name: PROVIDER
purpose: Identifier of the selected provider (default 'groq').

name: PROVIDER_API_ENV_groq
purpose: Name of the environment variable that may contain the Groq API key.

name: PROVIDER_CLI
purpose: CLI-provided provider override (set via --provider); used as context when resolving active provider and persisted defaults.

name: PROVIDER_DIR
purpose: Directory dei provider caricati, derivata da GROQBASH_EXTRAS_DIR o canonical_config_dir.

name: PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE
purpose: Flag indicating interactive provider selection was requested (set when --provider is given without an argument).

name: PROVIDER_MODULE_PATH
purpose: Percorso del modulo provider da caricare: PROVIDERS_DIR/<provider>.sh.

name: PROVIDERS_DIR
purpose: Directory containing provider modules; used to build SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS.

name: PWD
purpose: Variabile d'ambiente implicita del shell che contiene la working directory corrente; non definita esplicitamente nel codice PRECORE_RUN.
refs: implicit environment (not defined in PRECORE_RUN code)

name: QUIET
purpose: Flag to suppress non-essential output.

name: RANDOM
purpose: Variabile built-in di bash che fornisce un numero pseudo-random; non definita esplicitamente nel codice PRECORE_RUN ma utilizzata (es. in session_append per generare rand).

name: REFRESH_MODELS
purpose: When set, triggers model refresh flow (requires API key) and exits after refresh.

name: RESP
purpose: Path to the response JSON file where API responses and diagnostics are written.

name: RUN_TMPDIR
purpose: Run-specific temporary directory created under GROQBASH_TMPDIR for payload/resp/errf.

name: SCRIPT_DATE
purpose: Data di versione dello script.

name: SCRIPT_NAME
purpose: Nome dello script: groqbash.

name: SCRIPT_VERSION
purpose: Versione dello script: 2.0.0.

name: SCRIPTDIR
purpose: Directory in cui risiede lo script, risolta tramite resolve_script_dir.

name: SE_AVAILABLE
purpose: Indicates availability/preference for the optional Session Engine.

name: SE_ENGINE_PATH
purpose: Path/context used by the optional Session Engine.

name: SESSION_CACHE_DIR
purpose: Directory dove sono memorizzate le cache di sessione; costruita da GROQBASH_CONFIG_DIR o fallback a GROQBASH_DIR/config.

name: SESSION_DIR
purpose: Directory delle sessioni: GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR/sessions.

name: SESSION_ID
purpose: Variabile CLI/sessione inizializzata a stringa vuota per evitare errori; usata dalle helper di sessione.

name: SESSION_WINDOW
purpose: Parametro di default per la finestra di sessione (numero di messaggi da considerare); inizializzato a vuoto per evitare set -u failures.

name: SET_DEFAULT_MODEL
purpose: Flag/variabile per impostare il modello di default; inizializzata a vuoto come default non distruttivo.

name: SRC_BASE
purpose: Source base directory for extras installation (either explicit INSTALL_EXTRAS_SRC or default SCRIPTDIR/extras), canonicalized before copying.

name: STDIN_CONTENT
purpose: Contiene il contenuto letto da stdin quando JSON_INPUT non è impostato; inizializzata a stringa vuota e popolata con cat - se stdin non è un TTY.

name: STREAM_MODE
purpose: Flag normalized into the payload to request streaming responses from the provider.

name: SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS
purpose: List of supported providers constructed from default 'groq' plus provider modules in PROVIDERS_DIR.

name: TEMPLATE
purpose: Template used by assemble_content when constructing CONTENT; preserves newlines when substituting {{CONTENT}}.

name: TEMPERATURE
purpose: Runtime default parameter for temperature used when building payloads.

name: THRESHOLD
purpose: Soglia numerica di default (usata nel runtime); inizializzata con valore predefinito per comportamento dell'applicazione.

name: TMP_LOCK
purpose: Lock file used for temporary directory/file operations coordination.

name: TURE
purpose: Parameter representing temperature as a numeric string; validated and converted for jq.

name: VALID_MESSAGES_JSON
purpose: Contiene la rappresentazione JSON (array) dei messaggi validi usata per costruire il payload inviato al provider. Viene popolata in ordine di priorità da JSON_INPUT (.messages o .content/.prompt), MESSAGES_JSON, BUILD_MESSAGES_FILE (.messages), o CONTENT; se nessuna sorgente valida è presente viene impostata sul fallback '[{"role":"user","content":""}]'.
